page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 8 physical cores of an Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 4.0 GB per core. For hardware acceleration, it includes a single NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU with 8 GB of dedicated VRAM. It does not include local storage, and features a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate that the CPU and memory subsystems operate on the lower end of the performance spectrum. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance falls into the bottom 10%, while multi-core performance is categorized as weak, in the bottom 25%. Memory bandwidth tests, both for small cached blocks and large uncached blocks, consistently rank in the bottom 25%. Similarly, database operations, Redis SET operations, and static web serving throughput are classified as weak, reflecting the older Broadwell architecture and memory controller limitations.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this instance offers an entry-level entry point for GPU-accelerated workloads without the premium associated with newer architecture classes. The primary tradeoff is the lower CPU and memory performance compared to modern generations. This instance is best suited for workloads that offload processing to the GPU, such as light machine learning inference, video transcoding, and legacy CUDA-based applications, rather than CPU-bound or memory-intensive database tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 vCPUs, 32.0 GB of RAM, and a single NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps and contains no local storage. Benchmark data shows weak CPU and memory performance, with stress-ng single-core results in the bottom 10% and multi-core results in the bottom 25%. Consequently, the instance presents a tradeoff between dedicated GPU acceleration and lower general-purpose compute speeds. It is best suited for entry-level GPU-accelerated tasks, such as light inference or video transcoding, where GPU offloading mitigates the lower CPU and memory bandwidth performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance with 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU, designed for entry-level accelerated workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 8 vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU with 8 GB VRAM.
tagline: An entry-level GPU-accelerated instance pairing dedicated Intel Xeon processors with an NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU for legacy accelerated workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 vCPUs at 2.5 GHz
1x NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU with 8 GB VRAM
32.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth and no local storage
Suited for light GPU inference and video transcoding workloads
